meta.project: Eric Bellinger motion cover pitch package
meta.purpose: Creative pitch deck / proof of concept for subtle motion-cover treatments applied to existing album covers.
meta.created_for: User pitch to Eric Bellinger team
meta.note: This package assumes the original high-resolution album covers will be supplied locally. Hermes should animate the supplied artwork only and should not redesign or materially alter the original cover art beyond the specified subtle motion effects.

hermes_master_prompt: You are Hermes, acting as a motion-cover production agent. Your job is to create subtle, premium, loopable motion-cover executions for Eric Bellinger album covers using the user-supplied still cover art. Do not redesign the covers. Preserve the original composition, typography, color palette, and identity of each cover. Only add tasteful, restrained motion according to the per-album instructions below. The final result should feel official, polished, and pitch-ready. Each animation should be a seamless loop, subtle rather than flashy, and should never distract from the original artwork. If any source cover is missing, stop and request the missing source file before proceeding. If layer separation is needed, create masks/cutouts carefully and document all assumptions. Deliver final motion covers and preview exports with a concise handoff report.

priority_order: Use only the requested motion effects
Deliver export-ready files and a handoff summary
behavior_rules: Do not recreate the cover from scratch.
Do not move or distort typography unless explicitly instructed.
Do not change Eric Bellinger's likeness or overall composition.
Do not add extra effects beyond the requested motion and subtle enhancement unless absolutely necessary to make the loop feel natural.
If a requested motion target is ambiguous, preserve the art and apply the effect conservatively.
Keep all motion slow and organic.
Mask edges cleanly to avoid visible cutout artifacts.
Maintain album-cover readability at all times.

required_assets: High-resolution cover image for each album/project (PNG or JPG preferred)
optional_assets: Brand deck or pitch deck template if these clips will be embedded in a presentation
inputs_required.if_missing_assets: Pause execution and ask the user to provide the missing source cover files before building the motion covers.

preferred_stack: Remotion or Motion Canvas for code-driven motion assembly
ImageMagick or Photoshop scripting for prep if needed
Optional: After Effects if Hermes has access to that workflow
workflow_steps: 1. Ingest the source album cover into the correct project folder.
2. Inspect the image and identify the exact visual regions that need motion.
3. Create masks or isolate motion layers (smoke, clouds, water, foliage, stars, spotlight glow, etc.).
4. Build subtle looping animation curves for each motion element.
5. Composite the moving elements back into the original cover without breaking the composition.
7. Render a preview MP4 and a final deliverable MP4.
8. Generate a handoff note describing what was animated on each cover and any assumptions made.

additional_deliverables: 1 still poster frame JPG or PNG
1 short preview file for quick review
1 notes file per album describing motion treatment

global_art_direction.motion_philosophy: Subtle ambient life. The viewer should feel the art is breathing, not being transformed into a flashy visualizer.

acceptable_motion_profile.water: slow ebb and flow with minimal displacement
acceptable_motion_profile.flora: light wind sway with small arc movement
acceptable_motion_profile.stars: small twinkle/pulse with slight intensity variance

avoid: Harsh zooms
Rapid particle systems
Heavy camera motion
Overly bright glows
Warping faces or text
Anything that makes the cover look fan-made in a cheap way

album_instructions.title: Cuffing Season
album_instructions.objective: Create a subtle ambient nature treatment that makes the cover feel alive while preserving its romantic, dreamy mood.

motion_targets.instruction: Add slow cloud/smoke movement with a gentle horizontal drift and light opacity breathing. Keep it soft and atmospheric.

motion_targets.element: flowers and trees inside the head outlines
motion_targets.instruction: Animate the flowers and trees so they sway lightly as if moved by a soft breeze. The movement should be gentle and organic, not exaggerated.
Add a subtle twinkling or shimmer effect to the sun. Keep it elegant and intermittent rather than flashy.
Create a mild ebb-and-flow motion in the water so it feels alive. Use restrained ripple displacement only.

album_instructions.loop_notes: Make the smoke and water loops long and smooth so the loop point is invisible.
avoid: Do not animate the heads themselves
Do not create strong wave motion
Do not make the sun blink hard

album_instructions.title: Cuffing Season Pt. 2
album_instructions.objective: Animate each quadrant with its own subtle environmental movement while preserving the collage structure.

motion_targets.instruction: Add drifting smoke and a few subtle falling particles. The particles should be sparse and soft, not dense.
Add soft star twinkles with minimal brightness pulsing so the stars feel alive.
Add a gentle blowing-snow effect. The snow should move diagonally as if driven by wind and remain subtle.
Add cloud movement with a slow, natural drift. Keep the effect ambient rather than dramatic.

album_instructions.loop_notes: Because this cover has multiple zones, balance the motion so no quadrant overpowers the others.
avoid: Do not let particle density become distracting
Do not move panel borders or typography
Do not make the snowstorm intense

album_instructions.title: Cuffing Season 3
album_instructions.objective: Add soft wind-driven environmental motion and subtle water movement while keeping the cover classy and calm.

motion_targets.instruction: Animate the flowers with a subtle sway/rustle, as though touched by light wind.
Make the palm fronds gently move and rustle with the same wind profile as the flowers.
Add subtle leaf movement to reinforce the breeze effect.

motion_targets.element: water in the background of the middle image
motion_targets.instruction: Animate the water with a restrained ebb-and-flow effect. Keep the movement minimal and seamless.

album_instructions.loop_notes: Use one unified wind rhythm across the foliage so the scene feels cohesive.
avoid: Do not animate faces or body posture
Do not create choppy foliage motion
Do not make the water noticeably turbulent

album_instructions.title: It'll All Make Sense Later
album_instructions.objective: Bring the scene to life with restrained environmental motion.

motion_targets.instruction: Animate the water so it has a gentle, continuous moving-water effect.
Animate the plant life with a slight sway as if moved by a light breeze.
Add soft drifting smoke motion with subtle opacity variation.

album_instructions.loop_notes: Keep the overall movement introspective and mature, not energetic.
avoid: Do not add extra glow or particles unless needed for realism
Do not overcomplicate the scene

album_instructions.title: It'll All Make Sense Later (Deluxe)
album_instructions.objective: Create a restrained hero glow treatment behind Eric Bellinger.

motion_targets.instruction: Add a soft green glow or aura behind Eric Bellinger. The glow should subtly pulse or breathe, remaining elegant and not overpowering the art.

album_instructions.loop_notes: This motion cover should be extremely minimal and premium. The glow pulse should be slow and smooth.
avoid: Do not turn the glow into a neon effect
Do not add unrelated motion elsewhere unless necessary for integration

album_instructions.title: It All Makes Sense
album_instructions.objective: Add a tasteful flowing-water effect while leaving everything else largely intact.

motion_targets.instruction: Create a slow flowing-water effect that feels natural and understated.

album_instructions.loop_notes: This should be one of the cleanest and simplest motion covers in the set.
avoid: Do not animate non-water areas unless necessary to hide seams
Do not add extra effects

album_instructions.title: It All Makes Sense (Deluxe)
album_instructions.objective: Enhance the spotlight with a subtle atmospheric glow.

motion_targets.instruction: Add a subtle glow/pulse to the spotlight. Keep the effect soft, cinematic, and understated.

album_instructions.loop_notes: Keep the spotlight pulse almost imperceptible but noticeable on repeat viewing.
avoid: Do not blow out highlights
Do not add lens flares unless they are extremely subtle

execution_checklist: Confirm all source covers are present.
Create an isolated mask plan for each motion element.
Ensure every animation is subtle and visually coherent.
Verify typography remains crisp and stationary.
Export the final loop in the requested specs.
Produce a quick preview render for review.
Write a short handoff note for each album.

creative: The original cover is clearly preserved.
Effects match the user's requested treatment per album.
No effect looks gimmicky or excessive.
technical: No visible jump at the loop point
No broken alpha edges or warping artifacts

final_handoff: A summary file listing all completed albums and effect treatments
Any project/config files Hermes used to generate the outputs

optional_addon_prompt_for_hermes: If you need to generate an implementation plan before animating, produce a short preflight report for each album listing: motion targets, masking approach, loop strategy, expected technical risks, and export filenames. Then proceed with execution.
direct_copy_prompt: Hermes, implement a motion-cover pitch package for the following Eric Bellinger projects using the original supplied album covers only: Cuffing Season, Cuffing Season Pt. 2, Cuffing Season 3, It'll All Make Sense Later, It'll All Make Sense Later (Deluxe), It All Makes Sense, and It All Makes Sense (Deluxe). Preserve the original artwork and apply only subtle ambient motion. Use seamless 8-second square loops at 1080x1080, 24fps, exported as H.264 MP4. For Cuffing Season, animate cloud/smoke movement, make the flowers and trees inside the head outlines sway, make the sun subtly twinkle, and make the water ebb and flow. For Cuffing Season Pt. 2, add smoke and falling particles in the top right square, stars twinkling in the bottom right square, gentle blowing snow in the top left square, and clouds moving in the bottom left square. For Cuffing Season 3, animate the flowers, palm tree limbs, and leaves with subtle wind movement, and make the water in the background of the middle image ebb and flow. For It'll All Make Sense Later, animate the water, flora, and smoke. For It'll All Make Sense Later Deluxe, add a restrained green glow behind Eric Bellinger. For It All Makes Sense, animate the water flowing effect only. For It All Makes Sense Deluxe, add a subtle glow to the spotlight only. Keep everything elegant, restrained, pitch-ready, and seamless. Export final files, preview files, still frames, and a short handoff summary for each album.
